current_market_read: market treats LITE as a clean AI optical growth proxy

evidence_against_or_gap: Growth may already be priced and could normalize after sharp ramp

current_market_read: market likely values LITE as a strategic external laser supplier for NVIDIA AI infrastructure

evidence_against_or_gap: Need product-level revenue, capacity allocation and margin disclosure
refresh_trigger: new NVIDIA or LITE product/capacity disclosure

current_market_read: market expects high-value product mix to keep lifting earnings power

current_market_read: market has already moved LITE from discovery to high-expectation trade
